channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Kevin Warsh Sworn In as Federal Reserve Chair
item.description: Kevin Warsh took the oath as Fed chair on Friday, with President Trump praising his leadership.

item.title: House Republicans Criticize Senate for Delaying Immigration Reconciliation Bill
item.description: House Republicans expressed frustration with the Senate GOP for postponing a vote on ICE and Border Patrol funding.

item.title: Trump to Skip Don Jr.'s Bahamas Wedding Due to Iran Conflict
item.description: President Trump announced he will stay at the White House this weekend instead of attending his son's wedding.

item.title: Former Minnesota Candidate Says Taxpayers Frustrated With Fraud
item.description: Kristin Robbins told Newsmax that residents are upset about tax dollars lost to benefits fraud.
